---
title: "Overview"
---


## Course Overview
* Course site (you are here)
* [Syllabus](syllabus.md)
* [Assignments](requirements.qmd)
* [Schedule](schedule.md)

## Why study the neuroscience of language?

::: {.callout-tip appearance=simple}
# Learning Goals
1. Identify one reason to study language
1. Identify one reason to study the brain
1. Recognize that there are multiple levels at which one can understand a cognitive system, and understand the differences

:::

Slides: [<span class="blue-badge">Overview ↗</span>](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1S-twq_R9KZWHKwUxCgpskvh7g66OaMdo1Z-OYOKt820/edit?slide=id.g3d423b79775_0_0#slide=id.g3d423b79775_0_0)

Readings: <span class = "reading-badge">SGN Ch. 1: **Introduction**</span>
